75070.subject: OpenAI is Building the “Full Stack.” Gain Exposure for a Lower Minimum.
75070.body:
Gain exposure to OpenAI for just $15K

Spark Fund 2 (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VVDgvT1lLnR8W1dfWKv62Qh0bW7xsyK95QKBKcN3ypqGd3pyd0W8wLKSR6lZ3p4W3x_56y2lvQqMN35tbJ7_prKYW6Qv_nl3d9JT2W7lV-H13Sw04PW7mPbyb91llbKW5HpvVy6l27bDW8h3xk-7cBb5GW5mM1xQ7PNCpyW6snn1T7zTB5zW22k-sG2pkksxW66bLZ67xtktnW6gBG031wF9JZW3xRY2v78X6YFW80cwhN8XqdTbW7TrDC05z8TWvW2rmfx35_rvxNW9b3qxj6jHnbkW8RfrDY34zSm4N8dPxLD6Jl2NW3XTW_s2Z-vGQW3lbDqv3478BlW1xt6N43t_LMfW6H063t1wGnxSW6WnvPy7mlTFFW6W_7MY7n7b_CN4ZlBPZZsZhrW2P7VCB6XHfknW5GVhFN4rjkqNf1CFbXY04 )

Hi Oleg,

As demand for AI grows, so does the need for high-performance chips, data centers, and processing power that make frontier models possible.

In the race to own that foundation, OpenAI just announced plans to build the “full stack.”

One of the pioneers of AI chatbots just unveiled its first custom chip, designed to make advanced AI faster, more reliable, and more cost-efficient than what's currently on the market.¹

For investors watching where this industry is heading, the timing is notable. OpenAI recently filed a confidential S-1 for what could potentially be “one of the largest [IPOs] in history.”²

A confidential filing does not guarantee that an IPO will occur.

With our new Spark Fund 2 (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VVDgvT1lLnR8W1dfWKv62Qh0bW7xsyK95QKBKcN3ypqGd3pyd0W8wLKSR6lZ3p4W3x_56y2lvQqMN35tbJ7_prKYW6Qv_nl3d9JT2W7lV-H13Sw04PW7mPbyb91llbKW5HpvVy6l27bDW8h3xk-7cBb5GW5mM1xQ7PNCpyW6snn1T7zTB5zW22k-sG2pkksxW66bLZ67xtktnW6gBG031wF9JZW3xRY2v78X6YFW80cwhN8XqdTbW7TrDC05z8TWvW2rmfx35_rvxNW9b3qxj6jHnbkW8RfrDY34zSm4N8dPxLD6Jl2NW3XTW_s2Z-vGQW3lbDqv3478BlW1xt6N43t_LMfW6H063t1wGnxSW6WnvPy7mlTFFW6W_7MY7n7b_CN4ZlBPZZsZhrW2P7VCB6XHfknW5GVhFN4rjkqNf1CFbXY04 ) , you can secure exposure to OpenAI at a lower minimum compared to some of our other multi-offering Funds.

You’ll also tap into several other companies at the frontier of AI, quantum computing, and digital assets, including names like PsiQuantum, Ripple, Writer, and more.

Regulation of cryptocurrencies is a hotly contested political and legal issue. As a result, Ripple has been the subject of state and federal scrutiny. Future legal or regulatory developments could impact the company’s operations. See the offering page for additional details.

The AI arms race is moving fast. We launched Spark Fund 2 to help you keep up with it.

View the Spark Fund 2
(https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VVDgvT1lLnR8W1dfWKv62Qh0bW7xsyK95QKBKcN3ypqGd3pyd0W8wLKSR6lZ3p4W3x_56y2lvQqMN35tbJ7_prKYW6Qv_nl3d9JT2W7lV-H13Sw04PW7mPbyb91llbKW5HpvVy6l27bDW8h3xk-7cBb5GW5mM1xQ7PNCpyW6snn1T7zTB5zW22k-sG2pkksxW66bLZ67xtktnW6gBG031wF9JZW3xRY2v78X6YFW80cwhN8XqdTbW7TrDC05z8TWvW2rmfx35_rvxNW9b3qxj6jHnbkW8RfrDY34zSm4N8dPxLD6Jl2NW3XTW_s2Z-vGQW3lbDqv3478BlW1xt6N43t_LMfW6H063t1wGnxSW6WnvPy7mlTFFW6W_7MY7n7b_CN4ZlBPZZsZhrW2P7VCB6XHfknW5GVhFN4rjkqNf1CFbXY04 )

75067.subject: Grove's penalty clock
75067.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/eaa70932-7ce4-467e-b338-a662ed575d6a/0xR_NL_Banner_Heading_Wordmark.jpg?t=1776775276)
Caption: 

———————————————————————————

Gm, and happy Thursday!

Risk assets traded lower during Wednesday's session, with equities trading down and crypto indices trading even worse. As BTC teases a breakdown, STRC trades to fresh lows, showing that credit spreads continue to widen. Meanwhile, equities onchain are the prettiest charts on the board; weekly spot and futures volumes are at all-time highs. 

Grove launched GROVE yesterday, its native governance token, nearly a year into a 30% income penalty from Sky for missing its July 2025 TGE deadline. Below, we break down the allocation structure, the Grove Points farming mechanics, and why Grove's balance sheet sets the distribution timeline more than any announced roadmap does.

———————————————————————————

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/42e942ec-f31d-4957-8722-a3ac7b121e1e/0xR_NL_Market_Update.png?t=1767631151) [Market Update]
Caption: 

As equities traded red on Wednesday, BTC teased a breakdown to new lows, reaching $59,062. Amidst the bearish backdrop and trend, the majority of crypto indices are registering negative returns on the weekly, with outperformance to the downside. Even gold is a notable loser on the week, trading down 7%. 

The only sectors of strength on the weekly are Lending and the Ethereum Ecosystem, up 7.7% and 6.7%, respectively. The outperformance is attributable to KMNO (up 21.7%) and AAVE (up 8.83%).

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/308b6716-945c-43fa-8938-9b8dc0128245/image.png?t=1782391807)
Caption: 

As BTC continues its drawdown, STRC has traded to fresh lows of $80, opening Thursday at $82. The discount to par shows credit spreads continuing to widen and the market requiring a 14% effective yield to hold the paper. With limited cash and a shrinking balance sheet of BTC in dollar terms, the viability of the instrument is being questioned. Despite this, MSTR continues to tap the ATM, using proceeds to buy more BTC and raise the cash reserve.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/b26ad996-f53f-4b8a-9a82-89e0a28166da/image.png?t=1782391807)
Caption: 

While token prices may look bleak, onchain equities are the prettiest charts on the board. Weekly volumes for equities across both spot and perps are at all-time highs. SPCX, for example, cleared $4.8B in futures volume, accounting for 44% of the weekly $10.88B total.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/f0409856-0d2

75065.body:
Video tutorials, PDF guides and business materials are now clearly organized in one place.

***************************************************************
Video tutorials, PDF guides and business materials in one place
***************************************************************

*In the Wexo app, you can now find a new section called “Wexo materials”.*

We created it so that all important information, guides and resources are available quickly and clearly in one place.

*In this section, you will find:*
*
Video tutorials*
Practical demonstrations showing how to use individual app features.

*PDF guides*
Clear step-by-step guides you can return to anytime.

*Business materials*
Informational brochures, presentations and other resources that help you better understand Wexo, the available features and the practical ways to use the app.

You can find the new materials directly in the app under *“Tutorials and marketing materials”.*

75044.subject: Pozvánka na vstup do aplikácie SBA educa
75044.body: Dobrý deň, Na základe úhrady FA za odbornú skúšku, Vám zasielame prístup na vzdelávanie do aplikácie SBAeduca. Vzdelávanie je zadarmo a ponúkame Vám ho ako možnosť prípravy na skúšku. Pre prvé prihlásenie do aplikácie kliknite na nasledujúci link https://www.sbaeduca.sk/Prihlasenie?iduser=130088&code=Gjizezcx Po prihlásení zadajte nové heslo. Nové heslo musí obsahovať minimálne 8 znakov, pričom aspoň jedno z nich musí byť číslo. Pri prvom prihlásení ešte pred vytvorením nového hesla budete 2x vyzvaný na súhlas so spracovaním osobných údajov. Po zadaní hesla už tento link nebude fungovať. Prihlasovanie potom prebieha cez stránku www.sbaeduca.sk. Prihlasovacie meno je Vaša emailová adresa a heslo je to, ktoré ste si zvolili pri prvom prihlásení. Ak heslo zabudnete, na našej stránke v časti prihlásenie je možnosť poslať si nový prihlasovací link. ––––––––––––- Ak ste už mali prístup do aplikácie a požiadali ste o nové heslo, tak Vaše staré heslo platí do zadania nového hesla. Ak nie je možné kliknúť na link, skopírujte ho do adresného riadku Vášho internetového prehliadača a stlačte ENTER. V prípade potreby kontaktujte: podpora@sbaeduca.sk ––––––––––––- Poznámka: Prosím neodpovedajte na tento e-mail. E-mail bol vygenerovaný automaticky.

75043.subject: Informácia o pridelení kurzu a aplikácii SBAeduca
75043.body: Dobrý deň, na základe úhrady zálohovej faktúry sme Vám v aplikácii SBAeduca pridelili kurz/y na vzdelávanie. Nájdete ho/ich po prihlásení na svoje užívateľské konto v časti Vzdelávanie/Moje kurzy. Prístupové údaje do aplikácie sa nezmenili. Tento email je zasielaný iba registrovaným užívateľom. Ak ste v aplikácii dlho neštudovali a medzičasom ste zabudli svoje prihlasovacie údaje stačí ísť na našu stránku www.sbaeduca.sk a v časti prihlásenie - zabudol som heslo si poslať link na nastavenie nového hesla. Váš login je: novosadovoleg@gmail.com Ak ste už mali prístup do aplikácie a požiadali ste o nové heslo, tak Vaše staré heslo platí do zadania nového hesla. S pozdravom tím podpora SBAeduca

75042.subject: Daňový doklad OFV
75042.body: Dobrý deň, v prílohe Vám posielam daňový doklad. Ak u nás zatiaľ nemáte svoje užívateľské konto v ďalšom e-maile Vám pošleme link na vstup do aplikácie na vzdelávanie. S pozdravom Sandra Sidor 0902778271
